scripts.check: node --check src/auth.js && node --check src/packages/package-catalog.js && node --check src/packages/package-store.js && node --check src/packages/credit-on-order.js && node --check functions/api/packages.js && node --check functions/api/orders/[id]/engagements.js && node --check functions/api/orders/[id]/engagements/[eid].js
scripts.dev: wrangler pages dev public --binding RUNTIME_SCHEMA_INIT=true --binding ADMIN_TOKEN=dev-admin-token --compatibility-date=2026-06-28 --persist-to=.wrangler/state
